page_content: ARHU789 Professional Development Practicum (1-6 Credits) Graduate students, in various disciplines within the college of Arts and Humanities, will learn the theory and principles of a speciﬁc issue or skill set related to academic or non-academic work. They will create original work in a hands-on practicum format. Restriction: Must have completed at least the equivalent of one year of full-time graduate study; and permission of instructor. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
